/usr/bin/ar qc libtsq_core.a CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/commands/CommandStack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/commands/ProjectCommandContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/commands/ProjectMutationCommands.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/diagnostics/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/music_theory/Chord.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/music_theory/ScaleDefinition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/music_theory/ScaleDegree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/music_theory/ScaleInstance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/music_theory/ScaleLibrary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/music_theory/ScaleMetadata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/midi/MidiExporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/midi/MidiFileWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/sequencing/AccidentalVisibility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/sequencing/Arpeggiator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/sequencing/TrackInstrumentReference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/serialization/JsonHelpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/serialization/ProjectMigration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/serialization/ProjectPackage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/serialization/ProjectSerializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/time/GridDivision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core.dir/ModuleInfo.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtsq_core.a
